unresolved_mentions: The filing states three nationally recognized investment banks were invited to submit proposals, but only BofA Merrill Lynch is named; the other two financial advisor candidates are unidentified.

CSC and Pamplona are referred to together as CSC/Pamplona for bidding purposes, but the chronology also mentions each separately; kept both the joint bidder and the separate named entities due to potential ambiguity in actor granularity.
